steps.title: Find Lena's purpose
steps.content: Lena plans to read all the books in the library in alphabetical order. Even after a long time, she is still in the B's and admits some books are difficult, but she keeps reading.

steps.title: Focus on persistence
steps.content: Choice A narrows the text to enjoyment of one topic. Choice B claims she prefers reading over other activities, which is not discussed. Choice D focuses on a single admired book, but no such book is described. The remaining choice captures her determination. The answer is C.
